mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_REPORT r LEFT JOIN TBL_JOB_POSTING j ON r.TARGET_TYPE = 1 AND r.TARGET_ID = j.JOB_ID WHERE r.TARGET_TYPE = #{type} AND NOT (r.TARGET_TYPE = 1 AND j.STATUS = '임시저장')
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_REPORT SET PROCESS_STATUS = #{status}, PROCESS_REASON = #{reason}, PROCESS_AT = SYSDATE WHERE REPORT_ID = #{reportId}
mapper.select: SELECT r.REPORT_ID AS REPORTID, r.TARGET_TYPE AS TARGETTYPE, r.TARGET_ID AS TARGETID, r.FK_MEMBERID AS MEMBERID, r.FK_MEMBERID AS REPORTERMEMBERID, CASE r.TARGET_TYPE WHEN 1 THEN j.FK_MEMBERID WHEN 2 THEN p.FK_MEMBERID WHEN 3 THEN c.FK_MEMBERID END AS REPORTEDMEMBERID, CASE r.TARGET_TYPE WHEN 1 THEN j.TITLE WHEN 2 THEN p.TITLE WHEN 3 THEN c.CONTENT END AS TARGETTITLE, c.FK_POST_ID AS COMMENTPOSTID FROM TBL_REPORT r LEFT JOIN TBL_JOB_POSTING j ON r.TARGET_TYPE = 1 AND r.TARGET_ID = j.JOB_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_POST p ON r.TARGET_TYPE = 2 AND r.TARGET_ID = p.POST_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_COMMENT c ON r.TARGET_TYPE = 3 AND r.TARGET_ID = c.COMMENT_ID WHERE r.REPORT_ID = #{reportId}
